Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE1 - Search emails for Priya Suresh, Vectral relocation, and Denver housing using search_emails (query: "Priya Suresh" or "Vectral Denver" or "Vectral relocation"). Find email threads from Rachel Whitfield (rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com) to Mina Hashimoto requesting three April relocations including Priya Suresh (Portland → Denver, April 14–18). Discover Priya's ESA German Shepherd named Atlas (85 lbs) requiring pet-friendly housing with fenced yard or dog-park access, landlord approval for 85+ lb dogs, and preferred neighborhoods RiNo/Highlands. Find that the "accessibility needs" Omar saw in the notes actually belong to a different employee in the same Vectral April batch, Terrence Nakamura (wheelchair user needing ADA-accessible housing with roll-in shower and 36-inch doorways), not Priya Suresh. Find that Mina Hashimoto is the account manager for Vectral.
OE2 - Search emails for Nadia Okonjo, PivotPoint Labs, and visa-related correspondence using search_emails (query: "Nadia Okonjo" or "PivotPoint visa" or "H-1B"). Find email threads from Sam Delgado (sam@pivotpointlabs.com) to Catalina Dubois requesting Nadia Okonjo's relocation (San Francisco → Austin, April 14–18). Discover that Nadia is an H-1B visa holder (Nigerian national) with visa expiring June 15, 2026, and that her address change must be coordinated with immigration attorney Lorraine Pham (lorraine.pham@phamassociates.com) within the USCIS 10-day reporting window. Find that Catalina Dubois is the account manager and assigned Fatimah Al-Rashidi as coordinator specifically for visa/USCIS sequencing. Find that the move will not proceed until attorney confirms USCIS filing.
OE3 - Search emails for Emilia Cruz, NorthWind, Steinway, and piano damage using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz" or "NorthWind piano" or "Steinway" or "KeyMove"). Find email threads about Emilia Cruz's Chicago → Denver relocation and the Steinway Model B grand piano scratch during extraction. Find that Craig Nguyen from KeyMove Specialty Transport (craig.nguyen@keymove-specialty.com) sent damage photos to Blessing Okafor documenting the stairwell scratch from the April 11 move. Find Pam Kowalski's escalation emails to David Chen including a final warning that NorthWind is evaluating continuing with MoveOps and has been talking to PathFinder Logistics. Find that Catalina Dubois (AM) promised a recovery plan on April 14 but never followed through.
OE4 -Search Slack messages for Emilia Cruz and NorthWind in #customer-support using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Emilia Cruz" or "Steinway" or "NorthWind", filter_in_channel: "C007"). Find Julian Brooks' message (approximately April 13) documenting Emilia Cruz's inbound call about the scratched Steinway from the previous day's move, noting she requested a same-day callback. Discover that the callback was never returned, confirming this is at least her second unanswered contact. Find CRM engagement crm_engagement_0d8a9121b53c logged by Julian for the call (~10:05 AM PT April 12) with phone (303) 555-0184 and "no owner assigned."
OE5 - Search Slack for Vectral and Rachel Whitfield context using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Vectral" or "Rachel Whitfield"). Find Mina Hashimoto's messages in #customer-support about two false Vectral expense rejections from the ExpenseBot pilot, noting Rachel Whitfield was informed and unhappy. Find broader #customer-engagement discussions about the Vectral contract renegotiation, Rachel demanded a 15% discount citing the ExpenseBot fiasco, Kevin Tran's stipend audit, and onboarding timeline failures. Discover the at-risk deal (deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk) with a 10% counter-offer pending Rachel's board decision (board met April 23).
OE6 - Search CRM for Vectral Systems using crm_search_companies (name: "Vectral"). Find company_vectral. Search deals using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_vectral") to find deal_vectral_april_2026 ($15,900, closed won for April batch) and deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk (churn threat). List engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_vectral"]) to find engagement_vectral_april_2026_wave documenting Priya Suresh's relocation details (Portland → Denver, ESA dog Atlas 85 lbs, $350 pet fee, RiNo/Highlands) and engagement_vectral_renewal_negotiation showing the ongoing 10% vs 12% discount negotiation with Rachel Whitfield.
OE7 - Search CRM for PivotPoint Labs using crm_search_companies (name: "PivotPoint"). Find company_pivot. Search deals using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_pivot") to find deal_pivot_april_2026_dual ($10,650, in progress, covering Nadia Okonjo + Diego Castañeda). List engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_pivot"]) to find engagement_pivot_april_2026_dual_reloc confirming Fatimah Al-Rashidi assigned for Nadia's visa coordination and move logistics.
OE8 - Search CRM for NorthWind Technologies using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind"). Find company_northwind. Search deals to find the Denver expansion deal ($14,700). List engagements to find eng_northwind_denver_recovery (documenting Raj Patel chain-of-custody violation + Emilia piano issues) and the Julian Brooks call engagement (crm_engagement_0d8a9121b53c) documenting Emilia's call about the scratched Steinway, no owner assigned, same-day callback requested but never returned. Discover NorthWind is an at-risk client: final warning from Pam Kowalski, PathFinder Logistics competitor threat, multiple unresolved issues (Raj security breach, Emilia piano, Catalina's missed recovery plan).
OE9 - Search Airtable Relocations for Priya Suresh using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Priya Suresh"). Find record recPriyaSureshPortlandDenver: Status In Progress, Move Start April 14 / Move End April 18, Assigned Coordinator Javier Morales, Special Requirements: ESA German Shepherd Atlas 85 lbs, needs pet-friendly housing with fenced yard/dog park, landlord must allow 85+ lb dogs, preferred neighborhoods RiNo/Highlands, ~3,200 lbs HHG including standing desk and dual monitors.
OE10 - Search Airtable Relocations for Nadia Okonjo using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Nadia Okonjo"). Find record recNadiaOkonjoSFAustin: Status In Progress, Move Start April 14 / Move End April 18, Assigned Coordinator Fatimah Al-Rashidi, Special Requirements: H-1B visa holder (Nigerian national), visa expires June 15 2026, immigration attorney Lorraine Pham (lorraine.pham@phamassociates.com) must confirm USCIS filing before move proceeds, 48-hour super notice required, weekday scheduling only (8 AM – 5 PM).
OE11 - Search Airtable Relocations for Emilia Cruz using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Emilia Cruz"). Find record recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver: Status In Progress, Move Start April 14 / Move End April 18, Assigned Coordinator Blessing Okafor, Special Requirements: Steinway Model B grand piano requiring specialty subcontractor, 27-day lease overlap (Chicago lease runs until May 15, NorthWind needs her in Denver by April 18).
OE12 - Search Linear for existing NorthWind and Emilia Cruz tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "NorthWind" or "Emilia"). Find linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 ("NorthWind retention response plan after April escalations") which explicitly cites Julian Brooks' support note about Emilia Cruz's unanswered same-day callback, Victor Huang's security breach email, and Catalina's missed recovery promise. Confirm there is no dedicated ticket specifically for Emilia's Steinway damage claim follow-up.
OE13 - Search Linear for existing Vectral/Priya Suresh and PivotPoint/Nadia Okonjo tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Priya Suresh" or "Nadia Okonjo"). Find no existing tickets specifically tracking Priya Suresh's housing follow-up or Nadia Okonjo's visa filing status. Existing Vectral issues cover Kevin Tran and Danielle Osei (#307 through #312); existing PivotPoint issues cover Ines Kovac (#319 through #321).
OE14 - Search QuickBooks for Vectral invoice using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria matching Vectral or INV-2026-0410). Find inv_vectral_april_2026 (DocNumber INV-2026-0410, TotalAmt $15,900, TxnDate 2026-04-02, DueDate 2026-05-10, BillEmail rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com) with line items including $4,500 standard package for Priya Suresh and $350 pet relocation surcharge.
OE15 - Search QuickBooks for NorthWind invoices and bills using quickbooks_search_invoices and quickbooks_search_bills. Find inv_northwind_denver_02 (INV-2026-0412, $14,700, including Emilia's $4,500 standard + $2,200 provisional piano surcharge + $500 lease negotiation). Find bill BILL-KEYMOVE-2026-0417 (DocNumber KM-44192-ICR, $1,200), the insurance claim rider for the Emilia Cruz Steinway piano scratch from KeyMove Specialty Transport, due 2026-04-24.
OE16 - Look up contact details for Priya Suresh using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Priya Suresh"). Find priya.suresh@vectralsystems.com, Senior Data Engineer at Vectral Systems, Portland address 2847 NE Hancock St.
OE17 - Look up contact details for Nadia Okonjo using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Nadia Okonjo"). Find nadia.okonjo@pivotpointlabs.com, Senior UX Researcher at PivotPoint Labs, 1847 Haight St Apt 5C, San Francisco.
OE18 - Look up contact details for Emilia Cruz using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Emilia Cruz") or crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Emilia Cruz"). Find her CRM contact records with phone (303) 555-0184 and Denver address (Blake St Apt 4). If email is not directly listed, identify the NorthWind domain pattern from other contacts (e.g., victor.huang@northwindtech.com, pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com) or locate her email in existing NorthWind email threads.
OE19 - Look up Julian Brooks' contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Julian Brooks"). Find julian.brooks@moveops.com, Lead Customer Support Specialist (T2), San Francisco.
OE20 - Send email to Priya Suresh using send_email (sender: omar.ibrahim@moveops.com, recipients: [priya.suresh@vectralsystems.com], subject referencing her Vectral Denver relocation and housing status). Content addresses her concern: confirms her relocation is actively tracked (Portland → Denver, April 14–18, Status: In Progress), Javier Morales is her assigned coordinator sourcing pet-friendly housing in the RiNo/Highlands area, her ESA German Shepherd Atlas's requirements (85+ lb dog allowance, fenced yard/dog-park access) are fully documented in the move plan, the $350 pet relocation surcharge is included in the invoice, and she should expect a direct housing update from the coordinator. Clarifies that the accessibility notes she may have seen referenced relate to a different colleague's relocation in the same batch, not hers, her specific requirements around Atlas are the primary housing constraint being addressed.
OE21 - Send email to Nadia Okonjo using send_email (sender: omar.ibrahim@moveops.com, recipients: [nadia.okonjo@pivotpointlabs.com], subject referencing her PivotPoint Labs relocation and visa/immigration status). Content addresses her visa concern: confirms her SF → Austin relocation is in progress (April 14–18), Fatimah Al-Rashidi is her assigned coordinator handling the visa/USCIS sequencing, immigration attorney Lorraine Pham has been engaged to manage the USCIS 10-day address change reporting window, the move will not proceed until the attorney confirms USCIS filing is complete, her visa (expiring June 15, 2026) provides sufficient runway for this coordination, and the team is monitoring the timeline closely. Reassures her that the filing is being actively managed and she will be updated as soon as confirmation is received.
OE22 - Send email to Emilia Cruz using send_email (sender: omar.ibrahim@moveops.com, recipients: [emilia.cruz@northwindtech.com or discovered email], subject referencing her NorthWind relocation and Steinway damage claim). Content acknowledges this is at least her second outreach and apologizes for the delayed response, confirms MoveOps is aware of the Steinway Model B scratch during the KeyMove Specialty Transport extraction on April 11, damage photos have been received from the vendor (Craig Nguyen at KeyMove), a $1,200 insurance claim rider has been filed (KM-44192-ICR, due April 24), the internal team is working on determining liability scope and next steps for repair or replacement, and she should expect a follow-up with a concrete resolution timeline. Provides Omar's contact information for any immediate questions.
OE23 - Create CRM engagement for Priya Suresh / Vectral case using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: documenting Priya Suresh's inbound inquiry about Denver housing and ESA dog accommodation, confirmed relocation In Progress with Javier Morales as coordinator, pet-friendly housing being sourced in RiNo/Highlands, response email sent from Omar Ibrahim, contact_ids: [contact_vectral_suresh], company_ids: [company_vectral]).
OE24 - Create CRM engagement for Nadia Okonjo / PivotPoint case using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: documenting Nadia Okonjo's inbound inquiry about H-1B visa filing status, confirmed Fatimah Al-Rashidi coordinating with attorney Lorraine Pham, USCIS 10-day address change reporting in process, move will not proceed until filing confirmed, response email sent from Omar Ibrahim, contact_ids: [contact_pivot_okonjo], company_ids: [company_pivot]).
OE25 - Create CRM engagement for Emilia Cruz / NorthWind case using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: documenting Emilia Cruz's second follow-up (voicemail) about Steinway Model B piano damage during KeyMove transport on April 11, damage photos received from vendor, $1,200 insurance claim rider filed (KM-44192-ICR), no resolution communicated to client yet, previous callback from Julian Brooks on April 12 was never returned, response email sent from Omar Ibrahim, flagged as urgent due to NorthWind at-risk status and Pam Kowalski's final warning, contact_ids: [contact_emilia_cruz or crm_crmcontact_51d814273551], company_ids: [company_northwind]).
OE26 - Create Linear ticket for Priya Suresh housing follow-up using linear_create_issue (team: team_relocations or team_operations, title: "Priya Suresh, Vectral Denver housing follow-up (ESA dog Atlas)", description: Client contacted support concerned about housing status for Portland → Denver relocation (Apr 14–18). Coordinator Javier Morales is sourcing pet-friendly housing in RiNo/Highlands for 85-lb ESA German Shepherd. Client has not received a direct housing update. Needs coordinator to confirm housing options and communicate timeline to Priya. Response email sent from Omar Ibrahim., priority: P2).
OE27 - Create Linear ticket for Nadia Okonjo visa tracking using linear_create_issue (team: team_relocations or team_operations, title: "Nadia Okonjo, PivotPoint H-1B visa/USCIS filing tracking", description: Client contacted support worried about visa filing deadline for SF → Austin relocation (Apr 14–18). Fatimah Al-Rashidi coordinating with immigration attorney Lorraine Pham (lorraine.pham@phamassociates.com). USCIS 10-day address change reporting window must be met. Visa expires June 15, 2026. Move cannot proceed until attorney confirms filing. Needs confirmation that USCIS filing has been submitted or immediate escalation if not. Response email sent from Omar Ibrahim., priority: P1).
OE28 - Create Linear ticket for Emilia Cruz damage claim follow-up using linear_create_issue (team: team_relocations or team_operations, title: "URGENT, Emilia Cruz NorthWind Steinway damage claim, second client contact unanswered", description: Emilia Cruz has contacted MoveOps at least twice (call logged by Julian Brooks on April 12 with same-day callback never returned, plus new voicemail) about the Steinway Model B piano scratch during KeyMove extraction on April 11. Damage photos received from Craig Nguyen (KeyMove). Insurance claim rider $1,200 filed (KM-44192-ICR, due April 24). No resolution or timeline communicated to client. NorthWind is at-risk, Pam Kowalski issued final warning citing PathFinder competitor. Needs immediate liability determination and client communication with repair/replacement timeline. Response email sent from Omar Ibrahim., priority: Urgent).
OE29 - Post shift handoff summary in #customer-support for Julian using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C007, payload: shift summary message, user_id: moveops_omar_ibrahim). Content covers all three open cases with urgency ranking:
(1) MOST URGENT, Emilia Cruz / NorthWind: Steinway piano scratch during KeyMove move on April 11. This is at least her second contact, Julian logged her call on April 12 and the same-day callback was never returned. $1,200 insurance claim rider filed but no resolution communicated. NorthWind is an at-risk account: Pam Kowalski issued a final warning to David Chen, they're talking to PathFinder Logistics, and Catalina's promised recovery plan was never delivered. Julian should start here, Emilia needs a direct call with a concrete timeline.
(2) TIME-SENSITIVE, Nadia Okonjo / PivotPoint Labs: H-1B visa holder (Nigerian national) worried about USCIS filing for her SF → Austin relocation (Apr 14–18). Fatimah Al-Rashidi is coordinating with attorney Lorraine Pham. Move cannot proceed until filing is confirmed. Visa expires June 15 but the 10-day USCIS reporting window makes this time-critical. Need to verify with Fatimah that the filing has been submitted.
(3) NEEDS FOLLOW-UP, Priya Suresh / Vectral: Denver relocation housing for her 85-lb ESA German Shepherd Atlas. Coordinator Javier Morales is sourcing pet-friendly housing in RiNo/Highlands. Notes were confusing because ADA accessibility requirements in the same Vectral batch belong to Terrence Nakamura, not Priya. Her specific need is pet-friendly with fenced yard. Housing update needed from Javier.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

🔍 Oracle Events
Oracle Events
OE1 - Search emails for Priya Suresh, Vectral relocation, and Denver housing using search_emails (query: "Priya Suresh" or "Vectral Denver" or "Vectral relocation"). Find email threads from Rachel Whitfield (rachel.whitfield@vectralsystems.com) to Mina Hashimoto requesting three April relocations including Priya Suresh (Portland → Denver, April 14–18). Discover Priya's ESA German Shepherd named Atlas (85 lbs) requiring pet-friendly housing with fenced yard or dog-park access, landlord approval for 85+ lb dogs, and preferred neighborhoods RiNo/Highlands. Find that the "accessibility needs" Omar saw in the notes actually belong to a different employee in the same Vectral April batch, Terrence Nakamura (wheelchair user needing ADA-accessible housing with roll-in shower and 36-inch doorways), not Priya Suresh. Find that Mina Hashimoto is the account manager for Vectral.
OE2 - Search emails for Nadia Okonjo, PivotPoint Labs, and visa-related correspondence using search_emails (query: "Nadia Okonjo" or "PivotPoint visa" or "H-1B"). Find email threads from Sam Delgado (sam@pivotpointlabs.com) to Catalina Dubois requesting Nadia Okonjo's relocation (San Francisco → Austin, April 14–18). Discover that Nadia is an H-1B visa holder (Nigerian national) with visa expiring June 15, 2026, and that her address change must be coordinated with immigration attorney Lorraine Pham (lorraine.pham@phamassociates.com) within the USCIS 10-day reporting window. Find that Catalina Dubois is the account manager and assigned Fatimah Al-Rashidi as coordinator specifically for visa/USCIS sequencing. Find that the move will not proceed until attorney confirms USCIS filing.
OE3 - Search emails for Emilia Cruz, NorthWind, Steinway, and piano damage using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz" or "NorthWind piano" or "Steinway" or "KeyMove"). Find email threads about Emilia Cruz's Chicago → Denver relocation and the Steinway Model B grand piano scratch during extraction. Find that Craig Nguyen from KeyMove Specialty Transport (craig.nguyen@keymove-specialty.com) sent damage photos to Blessing Okafor documenting the stairwell scratch from the April 11 move. Find Pam Kowalski's escalation emails to David Chen including a final warning that NorthWind is evaluating continuing with MoveOps and has been talking to PathFinder Logistics. Find that Catalina Dubois (AM) promised a recovery plan on April 14 but never followed through.
OE4 -Search Slack messages for Emilia Cruz and NorthWind in #customer-support using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Emilia Cruz" or "Steinway" or "NorthWind", filter_in_channel: "C007"). Find Julian Brooks' message (approximately April 13) documenting Emilia Cruz's inbound call about the scratched Steinway from the previous day's move, noting she requested a same-day callback. Discover that the callback was never returned, confirming this is at least her second unanswered contact. Find CRM engagement crm_engagement_0d8a9121b53c logged by Julian for the call (~10:05 AM PT April 12) with phone (303) 555-0184 and "no owner assigned."
OE5 - Search Slack for Vectral and Rachel Whitfield context using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Vectral" or "Rachel Whitfield"). OE29 - Post shift handoff summary in #customer-support for Julian using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C007, payload: shift summary message, user_id: moveops_omar_ibrahim). Content covers all three open cases with urgency ranking:
(1) MOST URGENT, Emilia Cruz / NorthWind: Steinway piano scratch during KeyMove move on April 11. This is at least her second contact, Julian logged her call on April 12 and the same-day callback was never returned. $1,200 insurance claim rider filed but no resolution communicated. NorthWind is an at-risk account: Pam Kowalski issued a final warning to David Chen, they're talking to PathFinder Logistics, and Catalina's promised recovery plan was never delivered. Julian should start here, Emilia needs a direct call with a concrete timeline.
(2) TIME-SENSITIVE, Nadia Okonjo / PivotPoint Labs: H-1B visa holder (Nigerian national) worried about USCIS filing for her SF → Austin relocation (Apr 14–18). Fatimah Al-Rashidi is coordinating with attorney Lorraine Pham. Move cannot proceed until filing is confirmed. Visa expires June 15 but the 10-day USCIS reporting window makes this time-critical. Need to verify with Fatimah that the filing has been submitted.
(3) NEEDS FOLLOW-UP, Priya Suresh / Vectral: Denver relocation housing for her 85-lb ESA German Shepherd Atlas. Coordinator Javier Morales is sourcing pet-friendly housing in RiNo/Highlands. Notes were confusing because ADA accessibility requirements in the same Vectral batch belong to Terrence Nakamura, not Priya. Her specific need is pet-friendly with fenced yard. Housing update needed from Javier.

✓Run #2The final response explicitly states 'the ADA requirements appear to have been confused between Priya and fellow Vectral employee Terrence Nakamura (who is the wheelchair user going to SF),' correctly disambiguating the two employees' requirements.

Ops needs to clarify.' This identifies the ADA/accessibility notes as belonging to Terrence Nakamura and distinguishes them from Priya's pet-housing requirement.
✗Run #4The final response mentions Terrence Nakamura's ADA needs but then states 'Priya herself also requires wheelchair-accessible housing, and that was the sourcing failure.' The agent fails to clearly establish that ADA notes belong to Terrence and Priya's need is only the ESA dog.
✗Run #5The final response incorrectly states 'The ADA requirements and pet requirements both legitimately belong to Priya — confirmed by her own email.'
